'''Valorum Tower''' was a building on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] built in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] style. It was used as a sanctum for refugees during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. An upper penthouse of the tower contained the [[Hutt Consulate]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
